radar.title: Brix & the Coldfront
radar.relation: Ashfen, the black pin, and Aldric's reach into quiet arrests.
radar.hook: If the table stalls, let someone mention Brix is in the Saltbone again and drunk enough to talk to anyone patient.
radar.cueText: Brynja, tavern chatter, or dock pressure can steer them toward Brix right now.

radar.title: The Maw
radar.relation: The artefacts, the spiral geometry, and the same wrongness that touched Halvash.
radar.hook: If the mountain feels optional, use the Carver's spiral work or Brynja's warning to make it feel like an unanswered wound.
radar.cueText: The cargo, the Carver, or any talk of the mountain can make the Maw feel urgent here.

radar.title: Pell Duvash
radar.relation: The letters, Kohlmar, and proof that someone is watching the traders tied to Vane.
radar.hook: If Rowan drifts or the market scene needs heat, the Crow or a market whisper can point straight at Duvash before the assassins land.
radar.cueText: A Crow beat, market whisper, or Brynja prod can pull Duvash forward right now.

radar.title: The Records
radar.surface: Serris, the archives clerk, council scraps
radar.relation: Mathr's missing origin story and the Vane family's elevation sixty years ago.
radar.hook: If the conspiracy still feels abstract, let Serris or the clerk flag that Mathr enters the record fully formed and never quite ages.
radar.cueText: Serris or any council paperwork moment can turn the abstract conspiracy into evidence here.
